description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-linux-musl that runs on push, pull request, release, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should use an ubuntu-24.04 job with an alpine:edge container, reading repository contents. It should employ a matrix strategy with two build methods: python and cmake. For each method, it should check out the code, install dependencies, configure and build ninja, run tests, and report the ninja version and binary information.
